---
title: "Curriculum Vitae - Miel Hostens"
author: Miel Hostens
subtitle: "Robert and Anne Everett Associate Professor of Digital Dairy Management"
date: last-modified
toc: true
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc-location: left
    smooth-scroll: true
    number-sections: 
---

{{< include sections/profile.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/appointments.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/education.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/research.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/funding.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/teaching.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/supervision.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/service.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/publications.qmd >}}
